title: CustomWhisper
description: A simple plugin for whisper, msg, tell, etc. with configurable messages!
body:
# CustomWhisper  
send privat messages with /whisper /tell /msg /w

* 1.0 **without** reply
* 2.0 with **/reply** & **/r** to respont the last message

Colorcode permission: `whisper.colorcodes`
### Default Config
```
send: '§8[§6MSG§8] §eYou§7 ➟ §6{Receiver}§7: §f{Content}'
receive: '§8[§6MSG§8] §6{Sender}§7 ➟ §eYou§7: §f{Content}'
offline: '§8[§6MSG§8] §7The Player §6{Receiver}§7 was not found'
left: '§8[§6MSG§8] §7The Player has gone offline'
usage: '§8[§6MSG§8] §7Use /msg <player> <message>'
empty: '§8[§6MSG§8] §7You must enter a message'
silent: '§8[§6MSG§8] §7Nobody has messaged you'
clear-replys-on-quit: false
```
### German Config
```
send: '§8[§6MSG§8] §e§lDu§7 ➟ §6{Receiver}§7: §f{Content}'
receive: '§8[§6MSG§8] §6{Sender} §7➟ §e§lDir§7: §f{Content}'
offline: '§8[§6MSG§8] §7Es wurde kein Spieler mit dem Namen §6{Receiver}§7 gefunden'
left: '§8[§6MSG§8] §7Dein Chatpartner ist offline'
usage: '§8[§6MSG§8] §7Benutze /msg <Spieler> <Text...>'
empty: '§8[§6MSG§8] §7Nachrichten benötigen einen Inhalt'
silent: '§8[§6MSG§8] §7Du hast keinen offenen Chat'
clear-replys-on-quit: false
